parameters.query:
SET LOCAL hnsw.ef_search = 100;
 
SELECT
  id,
  doc_type,
  doc_number,
  doc_year,
  pasal_number,
  chunk_text,
  source_url,
  doc_title,
  status_hukum,
  jenis_pajak,
  chunk_index,
  total_chunks,
  1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS similarity
FROM tax_documents
WHERE
  status_hukum = 'BERLAKU'
  AND (1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector)) >= 0.30        -- [A] absolute threshold
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR jenis_pajak = $2)
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR doc_type    = $3)
ORDER BY
  embedding <=> $1::vector ASC,                        -- nearest first
  doc_year DESC                                         -- tiebreaker: peraturan terbaru
LIMIT 25;
